label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. So there are these five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a partner at the start. I need to track the partner switches throughout the song to figure out who Bob ends up with at the end. The options are Lola, Karl, Patrick, Sam, or Helga. Alright, let's start by listing the initial pairings. Starting positions: - Alice is with Lola - Bob is with Karl - Claire is with Patrick - Dave is with Sam - Eve is with Helga Now, the problem says that throughout the song, they trade partners in a specific sequence. Let me go step by step. First switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. So, Dave was with Sam, and Alice was with Lola. After switching, Dave will take Alice's partner (Lola), and Alice will take Dave's partner (Sam). Let me note that. After first switch: - Alice is now with Sam (previously Dave's partner) - Dave is now with Lola (previously Alice's partner) Others remain the same: - Bob is still with Karl - Claire is still with Patrick - Eve is still with Helga Second switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. So Eve was with Helga, and Alice is with Sam. After switching, Eve takes Alice's partner (Sam), and Alice takes Eve's partner (Helga). After second switch: - Alice is now with Helga - Eve is now with Sam Others: - Dave is still with Lola - Bob is still with Karl - Claire is still with Patrick Third switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob was with Karl, Dave was with Lola. After switching: - Bob takes Dave's partner, which is Lola - Dave takes Bob's partner, which is Karl After third switch: - Bob is with Lola
